text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Urgh... It's the holidays again already?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! You got a ton of boxes again! Sooo
many veggies!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tickezo. Can you take these off my hands
for me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What?! No way! Didn't your mom send you
these?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Look, there's even a letter attached! You gotta eat them, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Fine... If I have to.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, no. It'd be way too much of a pain to
cook all this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Better just share them with everyone at school.
Tickezo, gimme a hand tomorrow? I'm gonna give
it all to the cafeteria lady.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Y-you can't do thaaat!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Jordan's trainer! Please take these!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket leads Tosen Jordan into my office
carrying a load of cardboard boxes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here! Hope you enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: What is all this?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hot pot ingredients. My mom sent them to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There's crab and stuff too. Help yourself.
choice_data_list: You're not going to eat it?
You're not going to eat it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nah. This is one of my mom's hobbies. She sends
stuff to people and makes them cook.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Even though she knows I don't like cooking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a variety of excellent ingredients inside
the boxes, from carrots and napa cabbage to
frozen seafood.
choice_data_list: Is your family rich?
Is your family rich?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? We're just, like, average?
choice_data_list:
I guess they spend most of their budget on food
for you.

I guess they spend most of their budget on food
for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each ingredient is carefully wrapped, and there's
a letter with instructions on how to cook
everything in a microwave.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, maybe... But still, what am I supposed to
do with all this food?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan bends over and picks up the letter
stuck to the top of one of the boxes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"Enjoy all this delicious food"? I'm good. The food
at the academy tastes fine.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And I told her not to send me anything.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: Want me to try cooking something?
Want me to try cooking something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sure. Knock yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we've got all the ingredients, I decide
to make a hot pot.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Finiiished!
choice_data_list: The room's all decorated.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It was looking pretty basic before. Like, not very
seasonal of you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, speaking of. I wanna eat some chicken. Let's
buy some.
choice_data_list: You're going to have some hot pot too, right?
You're going to have some hot pot too, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, if there's any left over.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That was bussin'.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So you can cook too. Genius much?
choice_data_list: I just followed the instructions.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, if my mom sends stuff again next year, you
can cook that too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't mind if I'm just eating it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, speaking of. I wanna eat some chicken. Let's
buy some.
choice_data_list: You're going to have some hot pot too, right?
You're going to have some hot pot too, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, if there's any left over.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow. So you just put the whole thing in? That's
hilarious. Wingin' it, huh?
choice_data_list: That's what the instructions said to do...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Save it. I know you're lying, 'cause my mom hates
sloppy cooking. Admit it. It's just too much of a
pain to cut it up, right?
choice_data_list: I'm not lying!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes. Enough with the jokes already.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Here... I'll read it to you, 'kay? It says to put the
water in the pot and add the packet of broth.
Then...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: Like I said, right?
Like I said, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Mmm.
choice_data_list: Yeah, pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's funny eating hot pot like this with you. Total
New Year's vibes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No way, just nope. This is so weird.
choice_data_list: The food was good, though, right?
The food was good, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, sure. Thanks for cooking.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Guess I should give my mom a ring. I'll tell her we
ate it all together.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...And I'll tell her it was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Tosen Jordan calls her family from my
office.
